modules.label: The Living Constitution
modules.notes: Active governance-as-code research apparatus. STATUS.json tip_state_truth=tip_verified, reviewer_status=approved, governance_contract_version=v1.9.0. Has real git history (multiple commits), Docker/k8s infra, Python guardian service, Next.js control-plane app, tlc-evals evaluation library (F1-F5, I1-I6 invariants). CRSP-001 (Guardian Kernel) is Tier-3-Constitutional. Series B active. tlc-evals CLI verified working with pattern-only grading. Full model grading requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Marked partial because local test suite not confirmed this session — CI verified remotely.
